test_not_tautological.reason: A stub that simply inserts the expected text strings (phase comments, struct definition, variable declarations) into the source files without implementing any actual optimization would pass all f2p tests, since they only do text matching.

The agent could read /workspace/ClickHouse's solution/solve.sh (if accessible) or simply grep the test file to find all expected literal strings and insert them. The instruction.md itself also gives away every exact string the tests check for.
